# Measure it

> An AI Operations Platform with a Product Health Dashboard. Authenticated users track KPIs, traffic trends, pipeline funnel, use cases, product roadmap, and quarterly forecasts.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Product Health Dashboard — KPI cards, traffic trends, pipeline funnel, use cases, roadmap, and Q3 2026 forecast.
- [Use case detail](/use-case/$slug): Drill-down into a single use case with status, impact, owner, and timeline.
- [Sign in](/auth): Email and password sign-in and sign-up page. Redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
